STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE SCENIC STEAMSHIP CORPORATION's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint is continued to October 9, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and reply papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than October 2, 2014 at 4:00 p.m. or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported.
